title: polyscias marchionensis
intro: Polyscias marchionensis, also known as the Polyscias or Cabbage Palm, is a type of flowering plant in the Araliaceae family native to the Philippines. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Polyscias marchionensis include its ability to lower blood pressure, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. Herbal preparations of the plant are typically made by infusing the leaves in hot water, and it is also used in traditional Filipino remedies in the form of tea, poultices, and ointments.
